content:

This meets 4 out of 5 performance targets: steady-state error <0.5C (PASS), overshoot <10% (PASS), control duration >=150s (PASS), and max temperature <30C (PASS). The settling time is 135s, which is only 15s above the 120s target. All required JSON files have been generated and contain correct data.",
